summary: Mixed performance – a strong start that loses steam when the band rushes China Cat Sunflower into I Know You Rider; recording source unclear and no clear sound‑quality comments.
review: Reviewers note the concert opens well but gets sloppy after the rushed China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider sequence, leaving the overall show feeling uneven. No concrete information about the tape’s fidelity is given beyond a mention that Joani recorded the MSC source, so the audio quality remains uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed (some praise for the start but criticism of rushed songs) while recording quality cannot be assessed definitively; overall rating falls in the average range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Only note that Joani taped the MSC source; no explicit comments on clarity, balance, or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts great but the band rushes China Cat Sunflower into I Know You Rider, resulting in a sloppy feel for the remainder of the set.
